---
title: "Yuda Bi"
subtitle: |
  PhD Candidate in Computer Science
  [TReNDS Center](https://trendscenter.org/) (Georgia State University, Georgia Tech, Emory)
  ybi3@gsu.edu
image: files/profile/avatar.png
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ybi3@gsu.edu
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yclnpogAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yudabitrends
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yudabi/

listing:
  - id: recent-notes
    contents: notes
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, description]
    sort: "date desc"
---

## About

I am a PhD candidate at the [TReNDS Center](https://trendscenter.org/) (GSU, Georgia Tech, Emory), advised by [Prof. Vince D. Calhoun](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WNOoGKIAAAAJ). My research bridges **theoretical neuroscience**, **statistical physics**, and **deep learning**.

I develop multimodal vision transformer frameworks for brain imaging analysis, and investigate fundamental principles of information structure, redundancy, and spectral methods across neuroscience, finance, and AI. I am the founder of the **Structural Intelligence (SI)** framework.

**Research Interests**: Theoretical Neuroscience · Neuroimaging (fMRI/sMRI) · Statistical Physics · Financial Physics · Physics of AI

**Education**:

- PhD in Computer Science, Georgia State University (2020–)
- MS in Computer Science, University of Georgia (2017–2020)
- BS in Management, Shandong University of Science and Technology (2013–2017)

---

## Recent Notes

:::{#recent-notes}
:::
